Google Sheets Backup
📋 Setup (one time only):
1️⃣ Click View Script → Copy the code
2️⃣ Open Google Sheets → Extensions → Apps Script → Paste code
3️⃣ Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID_HERE with your Sheet's ID (from its URL)
4️⃣ Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App → Anyone → Deploy
5️⃣ Copy the Web App URL → paste below → click 🔗 Test
✅ Syncs: Students · Fees · Staff · Exams · Attendance to separate sheets
Auto Sync to Google Sheets
Push backup to Sheets on every save
📥 Restore All Data from Google Sheets
Pulls every sheet (Students, Fees, Staff, Attendance, Teaching Log, Marks, etc.) back into this ERP. Use when local data is lost.

⏰ PERIOD நேரங்கள் (4 Periods)
"+ Day Order சேர்" பொத்தானை அழுத்தி நேர அட்டவணை உருவாக்கவும்
💡 இந்த நேர அட்டவணை வருகை பதிவில் எந்த பாடம் தவறியது என்று கண்டுபிடிக்க பயன்படும் — Future Feature

🗂 Recovery History
📋 Google Apps Script — Copy & Paste into Google Sheets
How to set up:
1️⃣ Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script
2️⃣ Delete everything in the editor, then click "Copy Script" below and paste (Ctrl+V)
3️⃣ Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID_HERE with your Sheet ID (from the Sheet URL)
4️⃣ Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App → Execute as: Me → Access: Anyone → Deploy
5️⃣ Copy the Web App URL → paste in ERP Settings → Backup & Sync
✅ Copied! Now go to Apps Script editor and press Ctrl+V (paste)
